<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace NunoMaduro\Collision; use Symfony\Component\Console\Output\OutputInterface; use Whoops\Handler\Handler as AbstractHandler; /** * @internal * * @see \Tests\Unit\HandlerTest */ final class Handler extends AbstractHandler { /** * Holds an instance of the writer. */ private Writer $writer; /** * Creates an instance of the Handler. */ public function __construct(?Writer $writer = null) { $this->writer = $writer ?: new Writer; } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function handle(): int { $this->writer->write($this->getInspector()); // @phpstan-ignore-line return self::QUIT; } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function setOutput(OutputInterface $output): self { $this->writer->setOutput($output); return $this; } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function getWriter(): Writer { return $this->writer; } }
